data.body: Investigated at runtime: the silent-swallow described in the report does NOT reproduce on v0.10.0. The signable-PASS-that-fails-to-sign path already exits 11 with an explicit stderr message ('plan review PASSED but the attestation could not be persisted: ...; re-run to retry'), landed by 998cb442c (2026-07-11, in v0.10.0). Confirmed via a driven CLI repro of _review_plan with a PASS+signature.signed=False+error result -> exit 11, not 0. The report's baseline was v0.9.1 (pre-fix). No code change needed; superseded by 998cb442c.
